title: NZ Migration: Fact or Fiction
text:
The Kiwi Exodus
Net NZ citizen migration turned sharply negative after 2022. The shaded band shows the pre-COVID historical average ± 1 standard deviation.
                                                


Source: Statistics NZ ITM552301 — rolling 12-month sum.

Australian citizens are shown for comparison — Australia absorbs most departing Kiwis under the Trans-Tasman Travel Arrangement.
                                                


Source: Statistics NZ ITM552301 — rolling 12-month sum.

title: NZ Migration: Fact or Fiction
text:
India’s Rising Share
India has moved from around 5th to the #1 source country over the past decade. Each line tracks a country’s annual arrivals ranking (rank 1 = most arrivals).
                                                


Source: Statistics NZ ITM552301 — annual arrivals, non-NZ citizens.

India’s share of non-NZ arrivals on a 12-month rolling average.
                                                


Source: Statistics NZ ITM552301 — rolling 12-month average.
